summary: Time Tracker feature testing - all backend (12/12) and frontend tests passed. GET /api/stats and POST /api/stats/update work correctly. Stats page at /stats renders correctly with Today/All Time sections, back button, refresh button, and all 4 data-testid values. Time format (Xs/Xm/Xh Ym) verified. Existing features (alphabet, study mode, letter select) all functional.
seed_data_creation: Added test data via API: 3700 app_seconds + 30 practice_seconds to verify time format display. Stats: total_app=4015s (1h 6m), total_practice=97s (1m)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Time Tracker feature fully working. Backend: GET /api/stats (4 fields: total_app_seconds, total_practice_seconds, today_app_seconds, today_practice_seconds) and POST /api/stats/update (app_seconds, practice_seconds) both passing. Frontend Stats page at /stats with data-testids: stats-page, stats-back-btn, stats-refresh-btn, stats-today-app-time, stats-today-practice-time, stats-total-app-time, stats-total-practice-time. Home page has stats-nav-btn (BarChart2 icon). Time format: <60s shows Xs, 60-3599s shows Xm, >=3600s shows Xh Ym. Existing features unchanged.

backend: POST with only app_seconds (practice_seconds=0) increments total_app_seconds and today_app_seconds
POST with only practice_seconds (app_seconds=0) increments total_practice_seconds and today_practice_seconds
POST with both seconds increments both counters
Negative values clamped to 0 (stats do not decrease)
frontend: Home page stats-nav-btn (BarChart2 icon) navigates to /stats
Stats page at /stats renders with all 4 time card testids
ALL TIME section: stats-total-app-time and stats-total-practice-time
Existing: alphabet loads 60 letters, letter select works, study session launches
